item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: My heart sank after reading this I don't know why.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Gave me goosebumps at the end, definitely a new favorite

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This has to be one of my favorites on here. short and sweet. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: that certainly felt very nostalgic and made my hairs stand up reading it. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
It's really refreshing to see a wiki article that focuses less on the apocalypse and more people dealing with its inevitability. The characters also felt very rounded out, even with how short the article was, and the interactions all felt genuine too.

Hearty +1.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I think the intention is to never really say what it is beyond being very bad.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Am I missing out on something? What's the Scarlet Night?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
You know, at first I was like “oh, ok I’ve seen this trope before” with the whole “we never found people past such such year therefore the world must have ended”, but this doesn’t use it as a reveal. Takes it more as a starting point and plays it out from there, which is something we don’t see a lot of. Usually “the world is going to end” is the climax, so it’s refeeshing to see an exploration people dealing with an inevitable demise.

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I was dreamin' when I wrote this, forgive me if it goes astray
But when I woke up this mornin', could've sworn it was judgment day
The sky was all purple, there were people runnin' everywhere
Tryin' to run from the destruction, you know I didn't even care

Say say two thousand zero zero party over, oops, out of time
So tonight I'm gonna party like it's nineteen ninety-nine

With thanks to SunnyClockwork for crit.

I maybe shouldn't have rushed the posting of this, but I was starting to tweak it obsessively, so I figured I should post now before I started messing it up. Plus I really wanted this slot before it was taken :p.

You can find more of my stuff here.
